# SSH 单文件同步
# 替换 YOUR_HOST / YOUR_PASSWORD 为实际值后运行
#
# 推送单个文件
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "sync", "direction": "push", "local_path": "./app.tar.gz", "remote_path": "/opt/app/app.tar.gz"}
aitk SSH_

# 拉取单个文件
# 编码前: {"host": "YOUR_HOST", "port": 22, "user": "root", "password": "YOUR_PASSWORD", "action": "sync", "direction": "pull", "local_path": "./app.log", "remote_path": "/opt/app/logs/app.log"}
aitk SSH_
